goal: Prove that a composed price fails closed or remains bounded when one underlying oracle leg is stale, deprecated, or timed out.
setup_requirements: mockable oracle feeds or forked feed wrappers
minimal_state: all price legs fresh and protocol accepts price
attacker_actions: set one feed timestamp beyond timeout or mark unhealthy
call the composed price and downstream mint/redeem/trade path
assertions: top-level price reverts, returns invalid status, or uses documented bound
no mint/redeem/liquidation/trade succeeds with the stale leg as valid
common_failures: test only the direct feed but not the composed consumer
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
